title: What the Tides Forgot
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A marine biologist returns to her childhood home on the Oregon coast to settle her mother's estate and discovers that the tide pools behind the house hold specimens that defy known taxonomy and seem to remember her.
long_description: A marine biologist returns to her childhood home on the Oregon coast to settle her mother's estate and discovers that the tide pools behind the house hold specimens that defy known taxonomy and seem to remember her.
